CE1.justification: Acted directly without asking the user to load or restate anything; self-orientation via reading workspace files is invisible to the user and not an orientation cost on them.

CE2.justification: Single-sentence final response, no filler or process narration in user-facing output.

CE3.justification: Named destination (observations.md) and reason in one clause ('cross-cutting behavioral pattern per workspace methodology').

CE4.justification: One clean appended entry to observations.md; no in-progress artifacts to triage on interruption.
